policy: Tracked public GitHub files may be removed only after classification here. Local workspace folders under /Volumes/WS4TB are never deleted, moved, renamed, or archived by this manifest.
self_referential_sha_note: If this manifest is changed by a later CAM_Codx status-only correction commit, verify the exact containing commit with git rev-parse HEAD and git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main.
